keywords: SETNX hash tenantId cartId totalAmountCents idempotency key double charge prevention platform fee BPS FREEDOM escrow before order confirmed DNA-8
ironRules: SETNX key = hash(tenantId+cartId+totalAmountCents) — NOT cartId alone
On SETNX collision: unconditional return of cached result — no reprocessing
platformFeeBps from FREEDOM config 'platform_fee_bps' — not hardcoded
PII scrub before storeDocument on nonRepudiationAudit — no raw card data
Append-only nonRepudiationAudit with prevHash — no deleteDocument or updateDocument
